params.marketId: The market whose resolution to dispute

params.yesWon: true if proposing YES outcome, false for NO

requestResolution(uint256).details: MarketFactory calls this after confirming the market end time has passed.      Admin access is preserved for emergency use only.

adminResolveDispute(uint256,bool).notice: Admin resolves a disputed market (escalated decision).

disputeResolution(uint256).notice: Dispute a proposed resolution.         Caller must approve bondAmount of G$ beforehand.

disputeTimeRemaining(uint256).notice: Time remaining in dispute window (0 if expired or not proposed)

emergencyResolve(uint256,bool).notice: Emergency admin resolution without dispute flow (for edge cases)

finalizeResolution(uint256).notice: Finalize an undisputed resolution after the dispute window.         Anyone can call this — it's permissionless.

getFinalOutcome(uint256).notice: Get the final outcome (only valid if finalized)

getResolution(uint256).notice: Get the resolution state for a market

isFinalized(uint256).notice: Check if a market resolution is finalized

proposeResolution(uint256,bool).notice: Propose an outcome for a market.         Caller must approve bondAmount of G$ beforehand.

requestResolution(uint256).notice: Mark a market as needing resolution. Only callable by MarketFactory or admin.

documentation.text:
@title OptimisticResolver
 @notice Optimistic oracle resolution for GoodPredict markets.
         Inspired by UMA's Optimistic Oracle design:
           1. Anyone can propose a resolution outcome (YES/NO) with a G$ bond
           2. 24-hour dispute period — anyone can dispute by posting a counter-bond
           3. If no dispute: proposal auto-finalizes after the dispute window
           4. If disputed: escalates to admin committee for final resolution
           5. Loser forfeits their bond (split: 50% to winner, 50% to UBI)
         This replaces admin-only resolution with a permissionless system.
         Integration: MarketFactory calls `requestResolution()` when market ends,
         then checks `getResolution()` to get the final outcome.

@notice Finalize an undisputed resolution after the dispute window.
         Anyone can call this — it's permissionless.
@notice Emergency admin resolution without dispute flow (for edge cases)
@notice Get the resolution state for a market
@notice Check if a market resolution is finalized
@notice Get the final outcome (only valid if finalized)
@notice Time remaining in dispute window (0 if expired or not proposed)
